title: Talks & Workshops
description: Interactive sessions on product ideation, AI tools, and AI-assisted coding — plus help developing your AI strategy and the policies to use it responsibly. For teams, schools, and conferences that want to move from curiosity to something they can actually apply.

faq.q: What topics do your talks and workshops cover?
faq.a: High-stakes software delivery under pressure, elections technology, practical AI adoption, and digital transformation strategies for schools and enterprises. Sessions are interactive, not lecture-style.
